creator: brandon.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 153567
libgdiplus build log from poudriere.

Hello,

This port fails to compile inside my poudriere 10.1-RELEASE jail. The final output is included below. Will also attach my build log.

Thanks,

Brandon
